rationale: Array [0] encoded with the indefinite-length major-type-4 header (0x9f) and a break byte (0xff) instead of the definite-length form (0x81 0x00). Well-formed, but violates the definite-length-only rule (P3/D1).
Map {0:0} with the indefinite-length map header 0xbf and break 0xff instead of the definite 0xa1.
Byte string h'01' as an indefinite-length byte string (0x5f, one chunk 0x4101, break 0xff) instead of definite 0x4101.
Text "a" as an indefinite-length text string (0x7f, one chunk 0x6161, break 0xff) instead of definite 0x6161.
Indefinite-length array (0x9f) whose single element is a definite array [0]; the outer indefinite header is the violation.
Definite array [ [0] ] (0x81) whose element is an indefinite-length array (0x9f 0x00 0xff); the inner indefinite item is the violation, found on descent.
